raw_comment:
I noticed that:
- The western coast was spread out and scattered, whereas the eastern and most central states were spread out more flatly or thoroughly.
ace_sentences: The western coast was spread out.
The eastern states were spread out more flatly.
The eastern states were spread out more thoroughly.
Most central states were spread out more flatly.
Most central states were spread out more thoroughly.

The western coast was spread out
The eastern states were spread out more: states were spread out more flatly
Most central states were spread out more: most central states were spread out more flatly
most central states were spread out more
